overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 featuring a cowboy character traversing a mountain trail through forests and rocky terrain. The character walks along a scenic valley overlook before transitioning to running through a rocky pass and up a grassy hillside on a partly cloudy morning.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the mountain trail with a scenic valley visible to the left

entered.detail: wide valley with mist and distant trees visible below the trail
dense pine forest covering the distant slopes
narrow dirt path winding along the mountainside
tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the trail
tall evergreen trees lining the right side of the trail
steep rocky mountainside rising on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a mountain trail with a wide valley visible to the left, partially obscured by morning mist. The character walks steadily along a dirt path surrounded by dense evergreen forest, with rocky slopes rising on the right side of the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain path with rocky outcrops

events.description: trail enters denser forest section with closer rock formations on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail through denser forest with large rock outcrops appearing on the right

entered.detail: massive gray boulder formation looming on the right side of the trail
tall dead pine tree trunk standing beside the path

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a denser, more enclosed forest section where large rock formations appear on the right side. The valley view disappears behind the terrain as the character walks past a prominent dead tree, with the canopy blocking much of the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass between steep walls

events.description: character transitions from walking to running as the path enters a rocky corridor
emerging from dense tree cover into direct sunlight in the rocky passage

agents.ego_description: running through a narrow rocky passage with steep rock walls on both sides

entered.detail: steep rock wall forming the right side of a narrow passage
steep rock wall forming the left side of a narrow passage
sparse pine trees visible at the end of the rocky corridor

segments.scene_description: The character breaks into a run while entering a narrow rocky corridor with steep walls on both sides. The lighting shifts to bright direct sunlight as the dense forest canopy gives way, revealing scattered pines ahead at the end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy mountain slope with scattered boulders

events.description: exiting the rocky corridor into an open grassy hillside with scattered rocks

agents.ego_description: running up a grassy slope toward the hilltop, navigating around scattered boulders

entered.detail: open grassy slope with wildflowers and patches of dirt
large gray boulders scattered across the right side of the slope
small pine trees scattered on the left hillside

segments.scene_description: Exiting the rocky corridor, the scene opens into a wide grassy hillside under a clear sky. The character continues running uphill through the open terrain, passing scattered boulders on the right and small pine trees on the left as the trail climbs toward the crest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty mountain trail through a dense forest and into a bright, open hillside. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path beside a wide, fog-shrouded valley and rocky slopes. As the path enters a more enclosed forest, the valley view disappears behind large rock formations and a prominent dead tree under a heavy canopy. The scene then shifts as the character breaks into a run through a narrow rocky corridor, where the lighting transforms from forest shade to bright direct sunlight. Finally, the camera emerges from the passage onto a wide grassy hillside, following the character uphill past scattered boulders and pines toward the crest under a clear sky.
